creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #7)
> Note that my unit tests *cannot* be fixed as they also work on certain
> historical systems where grep -E and grep -F are in fact not available.
Hmm, interesting (and a good point).  Out of curiosity, which are those systems?

> Okay, so I understand that you want everyone to continue to suffer from
> nagging bullshit warnings.
No, you misread what I said above: "... but before we do that (if anything)", misjudged me, and closed the PR prematurely.
